prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is C-101 Form build & bracing within 2.5 Concrete & Masonry. The relevant subcategory is 2.5.1 Formwork. The observed field condition is: forms not oiled. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ACI 347. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T3 C-101 Measurement & estimation
